## Summary

What changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo test -p retrospective_core`
- [ ] `./scripts/run_phase1_harness.sh`
- [ ] If SDK hook code changed: phase 2 build + launch smoke test (`retro_status`, `retro_ping`)
- [ ] Docs updated, or reason not needed

## Notes (Optional)

Risks, rollout notes, blockers, or follow-ups.

Before requesting review:

- [ ] Related issue(s) linked in PR sidebar (`Development`)
- [ ] Scope is clear and bounded
